{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Karoshan throne
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Karoshan throne]] represents the authority of the Karoshans.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c31">''The Knight'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
